name: hallow-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for the Hallow platform team.

plugins.name: hallow-windmill
plugins.description: Build automation tools on Hallow's self-hosted Windmill, no engineering background required. Get a working dev loop, build scripts and flows by describing what you want, run them from a UI or schedule. Includes /wmill-setup, /wmill-doctor, windmill-build entry point, an onboarder subagent, the full set of Windmill authoring skills (write-flow, write-script-*, raw-app, triggers, schedules, resources, preview, cli-commands), windmill-capture-learning for recording gotchas, and reference docs for patterns, shared tools, and ACLs. Supports macOS, Linux/WSL, native Windows.
